summary: Iteration 56: Testing new features - (1) OdA form validation with description required, (2) Company logo in RdP/OdA PDFs, (3) Enhanced Arrivo Materiale form with detailed tracking, (4) Normativa field in Preventivi. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: OdA validation confirmed working. Preventivo normativa selector available in sidebar.

preventivo_normativa.update_normativa: PASS - Normativa can be updated from null to EN_1090 to EN_13241
preventivo_normativa.get_includes_normativa: PASS - GET response includes normativa field

arrivo_materiale.create_with_detailed_materiali: PASS - POST /api/commesse/{id}/approvvigionamento/arrivi accepts DDT, date, fornitore, materiali array with descrizione, quantita, unita_misura, ordine_id, richiede_cert_31
arrivo_materiale.link_certificato_to_materiale: PASS - PUT /api/commesse/{id}/approvvigionamento/arrivi/{arrivo_id}/materiale/{idx}/certificato links certificate (numero_colata, qualita_materiale) to specific material

pdf_logo.rdp_pdf_with_logo: PASS - RdP PDF generated with company logo when logo_url is set in company_settings
pdf_logo.oda_pdf_with_logo: PASS - OdA PDF generated with company logo when logo_url is set in company_settings

oda_validation.empty_description_handling: PASS - API accepts request but returns filtered righe (empty descriptions excluded)
oda_validation.valid_description_accepted: PASS - OdA with valid description saved correctly

oda_button_validation.button_disabled_empty_desc: PASS - 'Emetti Ordine' button disabled when all descriptions are empty
oda_button_validation.button_disabled_no_fornitore: PASS - 'Emetti Ordine' button disabled when fornitore not selected (even with description)

preventivo_normativa_selector.riferimento_tab_present: PASS - 'Riferimento' tab in sidebar of preventivo editor
preventivo_normativa_selector.normativa_label_visible: PASS - 'Normativa' label with helper text 'Determina requisiti di tracciabilità materiali'

oda_dialog.dialog_layout: PASS - OdA dialog with Fornitore dropdown, Righe Ordine table, Note, Emetti Ordine button
oda_dialog.righe_table_columns: PASS - Columns: Descrizione, Quantità, U.M., Prezzo Unit. €, Importo €, 3.1 checkbox
oda_dialog.totale_display: PASS - 'Totale Ordine: X,XX €' shown at bottom

arrivo_materiale_dialog.code_verification: PASS - CommessaOpsPanel.js lines 980-1116 implement: DDT number field (data-testid='arrivo-ddt'), Data DDT date field, Fornitore Combobox, Materiali Ricevuti table with columns: Descrizione, Q.tà, U.M., Rif. Ordine dropdown, 3.1 checkbox

oda_validation_logic.assessment: CORRECT - Button disabled if no fornitore OR all descriptions empty

pdf_logo_integration.assessment: CORRECT - Logo included in HTML template when logo_url starts with 'data:image'

normativa_api.assessment: CORRECT - CreatePreventivo and UpdatePreventivo models include normativa: Optional[str] = None field

arrivo_materiale_model.assessment: CORRECT - MaterialeRicevuto model with descrizione, quantita, unita_misura, ordine_id, richiede_cert_31, certificato_doc_id, numero_colata, qualita_materiale, fornitore_materiale fields

critical_code_review_comments: OdA button validation correctly implemented - disabled if fornitore not selected OR all descriptions empty
PDF logo integration in RdP/OdA uses company_settings.logo_url - should be data:image base64
Arrivo Materiale form includes all requested fields: DDT number, data DDT, fornitore dropdown, materiali table with per-material Cert 3.1 checkbox and order reference
Normativa field available in Preventivo editor under 'Riferimento' tab with EN_1090, EN_13241, none options
test_credentials: Dynamic test sessions created per test run
seed_data_creation: Test commesse with ordini for arrivo testing, company_settings with logo_url for PDF testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested: (1) OdA 'Emetti Ordine' button now validates description field - disabled if all descriptions empty, (2) Company logo appears in RdP/OdA PDFs when logo_url is set in company_settings (/impostazioni), (3) Arrivo Materiale form has detailed tracking with DDT number, date, supplier dropdown, and materials table with order reference and Cert 3.1 checkbox per material, (4) Preventivo has 'normativa' dropdown under 'Riferimento' tab (EN_1090, EN_13241, none) for early determination of traceability requirements.
